landing.title: BharatAgriLens
landing.subtitle: Detect plant infections, get tailored remedies, and ask follow-up questions in your language.
login.title: Sign in
login.session_expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
disclaimer.title: A quick note
disclaimer.body_ai: BharatAgriLens uses AI to suggest diagnoses and remedies. Always confirm critical treatment decisions with a local agronomist or KVK officer.
disclaimer.body_pii: We do not share your personal information with any third party. Images and queries are processed only to give you results.
home.scan_plant_hint: Use your camera to capture the leaf or stem.
home.upload_photo_hint: Pick an existing photo from your device.
home.ai_chat_hint: Ask questions in text or voice.
scan.title: Scan plant
scan.hint: Upload a clear photo of the affected leaf, stem, or fruit.
history.title: History
chat.title: AI chat
chat.start_hint: Type a question or tap the mic to speak.
chat.error_inference_down: Sorry, the assistant is offline right now. Please try again in a moment.
chat.error_generic: Something went wrong while sending your message. Please try again.
chat.stub_reply: (stub) Connect the inference service to enable real replies.
